title: crataegus coccinea var. pruinosa
intro: Crataegus coccinea var. pruinosa, also known as the Prickly Hawthorn, is a variety of the Scarlet Hawthorn tree, native to eastern North America. This deciduous shrub or small tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include cardiotonic and vasodilatory effects, making it useful in the treatment of cardiovascular diseases. The health benefits of Prickly Hawthorn include reducing blood pressure, improving circulation, and helping to alleviate symptoms of angina, among other cardiovascular conditions. Prickly Hawthorn is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
